# PlainHazard

> Natural disaster and severe weather data portal — FEMA disaster declarations and NOAA storm events.

## Data Source
- FEMA OpenFEMA API — 10,000 disaster declarations
- NOAA Storm Events Database — 707,100 events (2015-2025)
- 56 states/territories, 2,703 counties, 55 hazard types, 16 disaster types

## Pages
- State pages: /state/{slug} — disasters, storm events by type and year, county breakdown
- County pages: /county/{slug} — FEMA disaster history
- Hazard pages: /hazard/{slug} — storm event type analysis, state breakdown
- Disaster type pages: /disaster-type/{slug} — FEMA disaster category stats
- Rankings: /rankings/most-disasters, /rankings/most-damage, /rankings/deadliest

## API
- Search: /api/search?q={query} — search states, counties, hazard types
- Health: /health — service status

## Attribution
Data from FEMA OpenFEMA and NOAA NCEI Storm Events Database.
